reference_answer: Memo R-19 superseded Bulletin C-14 for parcel intake.
Revision Notice RN-31 was issued on 2027-01-06.
Before Memo R-19, the standard parcel weight limit was 18 kg.
Memo R-19 sets the standard parcel weight limit to 22 kg.
Memo R-19 removes the supervisor-note requirement for cold-pack parcels.
Memo R-19 adds a photo check for parcels with oversized labels.
Operations Review remains the approving body.
